docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,795.00 FILED BY DIAZ, ANA DBA PERFUMES MARGOTH DIAZ AS TO DEFENDANT TELEFLORA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-27-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TELEFLORA LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF ANA DIAZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY THEIR OWN NON-CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER CARLOS LOPEZ. DEFENDANT TELEFLORA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DARRELL HOUSDEN, VP OF WESTERN SALES. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESSING: CT CORP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ANA DBA PERFUMES MARGOTH DIAZ AS TO DEFENDANT TELEFLORA LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TELEFLORA LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ANA DBA PERFUMES MARGOTH DIAZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TELEFLORA LLC PLAINTIFF HAS CANCELLED HER TELEFLORA MEMBERSHIP BUT THEN RESCINDED. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT TELEFLORA CHARGED HER ITEMS SHE DID NOT AUTHORIZE OR OTHERWISE BREACHED THE MEMBERSHIP AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF MAY CANCEL GOING FORWARD BUT CAN NOT RECOVER FOR PAST CHARGES WHEN BOTH PARTIES WERE PERFORMING THE CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ANA DBA PERFUMES MARGOTH DIAZ ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
